name: r1_state_v0_2
purpose: Refined resolved state produced by the kernel map r0 -> r1, including reconciliation.

localized_site.description: Discrete site at which the spark resolves.

centroid_orientation.description: Finite orientation label of the centroid relative to the resolved spark.

reconciliation_state.description: Finite state describing how spark-local orientation and cube orientation have been reconciled.

initial_grammar_state.description: Seed grammar state for downstream deterministic propagation.

canonical_sentence: r1 is the reconciled centroid-oriented initial state.
